The '''''Warrior''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] set to rendezvous with an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoy carrying supplies and [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] by [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] at about [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]. The ''Warrior'' arrived early only to discover a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] force attempting to liberate the slaves. In responce, [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]s were launched against the Rebels. One Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Halley Kadorto]], was able to hold off the [[TIE series/Legends|TIEs]] until the Alliance escaped with the slaves.

{{Ship-stub}}
